member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.Persist.PersistActivity
member.summary: Writes all pipeline artifacts to the lead's storage folder in a single batch. Idempotent upsert with content-hash deduplication for communication records. Called as the final step of the lead orchestrator pipeline.
member.remarks:
Handles the final status write (Complete). Only Scored and Analyzing are written inline by the orchestrator as concurrency gates. All result data persists here. Does NOT write the PDF — PdfActivity handles PDF storage. Writing:
Lead Profile.md — status (Complete), score, bucket
CMA Summary.md — estimated value, comps, market analysis
HomeSearch Summary.md — listings, area summary
Lead Email Draft.md — subject, body, sent status
Agent Notification Draft.md — subject, body, sent status
Retry State.json — content hashes per activity

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.Persist.PersistActivity.#ctor(RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.Storage.IDocumentStorageProvider,RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Interfaces.ILeadStore,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.Persist.PersistActivity})
member.summary: Writes all pipeline artifacts to the lead's storage folder in a single batch. Idempotent upsert with content-hash deduplication for communication records. Called as the final step of the lead orchestrator pipeline.
member.remarks:
Handles the final status write (Complete). Only Scored and Analyzing are written inline by the orchestrator as concurrency gates. All result data persists here. Does NOT write the PDF — PdfActivity handles PDF storage. Writing:
Lead Profile.md — status (Complete), score, bucket
CMA Summary.md — estimated value, comps, market analysis
HomeSearch Summary.md — listings, area summary
Lead Email Draft.md — subject, body, sent status
Agent Notification Draft.md — subject, body, sent status
Retry State.json — content hashes per activity

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.Persist.PersistActivity.PersistStatusAsync(RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.Lead,RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.LeadStatus,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists lead status as a concurrency gate. Called inline by the orchestrator after scoring and before dispatch to prevent duplicate orchestrator instances.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.Persist.PersistActivity.ExecuteAsync(RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.LeadPipelineContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists all available pipeline artifacts for the given context. Skips any artifact whose context field is null (partial pipeline result). Sets final status to Complete before writing.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.Persist.PersistActivity.PersistCommunicationAsync(RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.CommunicationRecord,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes a communication record unless the same content was already sent. Dedup rule: existing file has same content_hash AND sent: true → skip.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.Persist.PersistActivity.ShouldSkipCommunication(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns true when the existing file has the same content hash AND was already sent. In that case, re-writing would be a no-op and could cause duplicate sends on retry.
